lines.en: Lily, how do you get to school every morning?
lines.zh: Lily，你每天早上怎么去上学？

lines.en: I usually ride my bike. It takes about fifteen minutes.
lines.zh: 我通常骑自行车。大概需要十五分钟。

lines.en: That is fast. I take the bus because my home is far away.
lines.zh: 真快。我坐公交车，因为我家离得很远。

lines.en: How long does it take by bus?
About thirty minutes, but the bus is often crowded in the morning.
lines.zh: 大概三十分钟，但是早上公交车经常很挤。

lines.en: That is tough. Sometimes my dad drives me when it rains.
lines.zh: 那真辛苦。下雨的时候我爸爸会开车送我。

lines.en: I wish I could walk to school. It is good exercise.
lines.zh: 真希望我能走路去上学。那是很好的锻炼。

lines.en: You could get off one stop earlier and walk the rest of the way.
lines.zh: 你可以提前一站下车，然后走剩下的路。

lines.en: That is a great idea! I will try it tomorrow.
